{"step_by_step_thinking": "Scar dehiscence is a complication that can occur in women who have had a previous cesarean section. The documents mention that scar dehiscence can lead to uterine rupture, which can cause maternal bradycardia, fetal bradycardia, and vaginal bleeding.
